productDisplayName: Aneri Women Black & Maroon Salwar Suit
description: Style Noteaneri comes up with a salwar suit that's guaranteed lend you that refined yet dressed up ethno glam vibe. Fresh off the brand's design studio, wear this unique salwar suit with ethnic sandals. Check out myntra's collection of ethnic footwear that could go with this lovely set!Product Details Kurta churidar set with dupatta Black kurta with a mandarin collar and a split V-neckline, gold embroidery on the yoke and embroidery all over Maroonish red churidar, has a drawstring waist and tapering hems Maroon chiffon dupatta with sequin details on it Material and Care Blended fabric Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Size and FitLength of dupatta: 223 cm (approximate) The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
